> THE PARADIGM SHIFT

The core architectural failure of legacy EDR is its assumption of linear, human-paced attacks. AI adversaries execute reinforcement loops, dynamically adapting and accumulating intent at speeds traditional single-point passive agents cannot correlate.

FIG 2.0 // AGENTIC THREAT VECTORS VS STATIC DEFENSE

! LEGACY_EDR_FAILURE

  • [-] Relies on static rules and signature matching.
  • [-] Requires reactive, manual human investigation.
  • [-] Open execution surfaces allow lateral movement.

* SERAPH_MANDATE

  • [+] Behavioral AI utilizing AATL/AATR registries.
  • [+] Triune autonomous defense response orchestration.
  • [+] Zero-trust execution gated by GSG capability tokens.

> UNIFIED_AGENT V2.0

The endpoint enforcement mechanism comprised of 13,398 lines of code. A cross-platform enterprise agent providing deep observability and strict adherence to the Governance Gateway.

> TRIUNE.ARCHITECTURE

Seraph's foundational philosophy is the separation of reality, reasoning, and action codified in RFCs 001-004. Trace how a system observation is translated into a governed, autonomous defense action.

World State Security Model

The canonical representation of reality. A Single Source of Truth (SSOT) aggregating telemetry from endpoints, networks, identities, and cloud infrastructure. Ensures reasoning operates on deterministic, snapshot-reproducible data.

Triune Cognition Fabric

Processes the World State to generate a Fused Cognitive Signal. By utilizing a tripartite architecture, Seraph prevents singular reasoning failures, hallucinations, or bias.

METATRON
Belief synthesis. Consolidates CCE signals to emit recommended policy tiers.
MICHAEL
Action doctrine. Maps cognitive intents into executable candidate command forms.
LOKI
Dissent doctrine. Challenges plans by surfacing explicit uncertainty markers.

Governance Sensor Gateway

The absolute execution control boundary. Reasoning systems cannot act directly. They only propose. The GSG validates proposals against enterprise policy before issuing tokens.

! RESTRICTIONS

True autonomy demands absolute boundaries. The Cognitive Layer is strictly forbidden from executing operations below without explicit GSG human-admin approval.

  • > credential_revoke
  • > mass_isolate
  • > wipe / format
  • > agent_uninstall
  • > encryption_key_rotate
